author: pushuo
message:
build: update auto_install.json configuration

1. 调整PHP版本固定为8.2，新增依赖扩展包
2. 新增MySQL、Nginx版本配置，添加可执行函数白名单
3. 补充public/plugin目录权限设置
4. 新增站点基础配置项如管理员邮箱、时区、缓存驱动等

author: pushuo
message: fix: make product search and autocomplete case-insensitive on PostgreSQL

author: pushuo
message:
fix: prevent file manager path traversal

修复：限制文件管理器操作只能在 catalog 目录内执行

author: pushuo
message: optimize(http): optimize request handling

author: pushuo
message:
chore: remove redundant origin check in message event listener

删除了marketing页面两个blade模板中多余的消息事件来源校验代码，简化监听逻辑

author: pushuo
message:
refactor(rma): extract customer order product check logic

将售后单创建时的订单商品校验逻辑抽离为公共方法，同时增加客户身份校验，避免越权访问他人订单商品的售后申请

author: pushuo
message:
fix(ProductRepo): sanitize product ids to integer values

确保传入的商品ID都是整型值，避免SQL查询出现类型不一致的问题

author: pushuo
message:
fix: add guest order access verification and payment support

1. 为游客订单添加订单详情页访问校验，未登录用户只能通过订单号和邮箱查看自己的订单
2. 为游客订单的支付、确认收货、取消订单操作添加邮箱参数校验
3. 存储游客订单号到session中用于权限验证

author: pushuo
message:
fix(CheckoutService): add address ownership validation

修复结账流程中收货地址和支付地址未验证归属权的问题，同时新增地址存在性校验逻辑，防止使用不属于当前用户的收货/支付地址

author: pushuo
message:
fix(product-video): use @json instead of raw echo to escape video url

fix the potential xss issue when outputting product video link, use blade's @json directive to properly escape the content instead of raw {!! !!} syntax

author: pushuo
message:
fix(admin zones page): handle empty country data gracefully

修复区域列表页中国家名称为空时页面报错的问题，当zone.country不存在时显示占位符'-'

author: Zbl1007
message:
Add PayPal NVP/SOAP API support (#130)

* feat: address beikeshop/beikeshop#33 能不能在paypal支付插件里加入NVP/SOAP API接口的标准？

* fix(paypal): complete nvp soap support

* fix(paypal): preserve rest currency behavior

Signed-off-by: Zbl1007 <1399853961@qq.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Zbl1007 <1399853961@qq.com>

author: pushuo
message:
refactor(Shop/Cart): use ?: instead of ?? for weight fallback

将获取商品重量的空合并运算符替换为三元运算符，在sku重量存在但为0时也会使用商品默认重量，优化取值逻辑

author: pushuo
message:
feat(cache): add has and add cache methods, optimize existing code

1. 新增has方法用于判断缓存是否存在且未过期
2. 新增add方法用于仅在缓存不存在时写入缓存
3. 统一代码风格，在函数调用前后添加空格
4. 完善缓存过期处理逻辑

author: pushuo
message: build: update build version date to 20260225

author: pushuo
message: fix: sanitize design module ids to prevent second-order SQL injection

author: pushuo
message: fix: Fix Stripe Webhook signature verification vulnerability.

author: Guangda Network
message:
Update SECURITY.md

fix the version

author: Guangda Network
message:
Create SECURITY.md for security policy and reporting

Added a security policy document outlining supported versions and vulnerability reporting.

author: pushuo
message:
fix(plugin): add skip condition for design builder registration

当自定义模板类的registerDesignBuilder方法返回false时，跳过注册该模板构建器

author: pushuo
message: fix(TextSlideShow): resolve error thrown after deleting images

author: pushuo
message:
refactor(Helpers): rewrite get_safe_host to prioritize app.url config

update the host acquisition logic to first use the configured app.url, then fall back to server-side variables, enhance security by validating against allowed hosts

author: pushuo
message: Fix: Improved the error message indicating a mismatch between the domain name and the app URL.

author: pushuo
message:
fix(beikehttp): adjust api path configurations

move /api/v1/version to flexible signature paths group
fix trailing comma in static api paths array

message: refactor(Plugin): remove plugin import feature and related routes

message: refactor(Paypal): Remove redundant verification rules from the Paypal configuration

message: fix(plugin): Optimized error handling logic when retrieving a single plugin
